summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM - VIN Intelligence Platform. All major features working correctly including public pages, VIN search, admin authentication, and backend APIs.

minor_issues.issue: Health check endpoint returns 404 Not Found

passed_tests: Public Home page loads with correct stats (12 total, 12 active, 12 upcoming, 10 hot)
Public Vehicles catalog with working filters and search functionality
Public VIN Check accepts 17-char VIN and returns vehicle data with price, timer, images
Admin login page displays form with pre-filled credentials
Admin login with admin@crm.com/admin123 successfully redirects to dashboard
Admin dashboard shows Control Dashboard with comprehensive CRM metrics
Backend API /api/auction-ranking/stats returns correct stats structure
Backend API /api/auction-ranking/hot returns hot auctions array
Backend API /api/public/vin/1HGBH41JXMN109186 returns complete vehicle data
VIN search form validation and character counter working
Vehicle cards display properly with images, prices, and timers
Admin authentication and JWT token handling working
Dashboard KPI cards and sections loading correctly

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - only health endpoint missing)
